title: turnera venosa
intro: Turnera venosa, also known as Mayan balsam or Maypop, is a species of flowering plant in the passionflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Turnera venosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes. Turnera venosa can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and supplements.
